TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.TRANSL: “Come on, Ngangay, let’s collect some taro.

S.FORM: "ku alapaw anga i tja i navanavaɫ."
S.PHON: "ku aɭapaw aŋa i ca i navanavaʎ."
S.FORM: "ku alapaw anga i tja i navanavalj."
S.PHON: "ku aɭapaw aŋa i ʦa i navanavaʎ."
S.TRANSL: “I’ll take him down when we get fyrther down south (? or to the right hand end).
“I’ll take him when we get to the end of the row.” (?)
I’m going to get some more taro.

S.FORM: ku patutuaw anga nusauni, nuka djemaqudjaqut aken."
S.PHON: ku patutuaw aŋa nusauni, nuka ɉəmaquɉaqut akən."
S.FORM: ku patutuaw anga nusauni, nuka djemaqudjaqut aken."
S.PHON: ku patutuaw aŋa nusauni, nuka ɉəmaquɉaqut akən."
S.TRANSL: I’ll suckle him later, while I cut the taro ends off.”

S.FORM: ku vutsilaw anan a tja kinsa a pasa qelutseqets."
S.PHON: ku vuʦiɭaw anan a ca kinsa a pasa qəɭuʦəqəʦ."
S.FORM: ku vucilaw anan a tja kinsa a pasa qeluceqec."
S.PHON: ku vuʦiɭaw anan a ʦa kinsa a pasa qəɭuʦəqəʦ."
S.TRANSL: I’ll set our food down on a tree.” (?)
She threw over some taro peel.
Ngangay crumbled it up and handed it over to him.

S.FORM: "pai vuɫuqi tu ita a ku kaka."
S.PHON: "pai vuʎuqi tu ita a ku kaka."
S.FORM: "pai vuljuqi tu ita a ku kaka."
S.PHON: "pai vuʎuqi tu ita a ku kaka."

S.FORM: ngitsu sakamaya sivuɫuq, sa ɫuɫu-i tu sikilunung ni Ngangay.
S.PHON: ŋiʦu sakamaja sivuʎuq, sa ʎuʎu-i tu sikiɭunuŋ ni ŋaŋaj.
S.FORM: ngicu sakamaya sivuljuq, sa ljulju-i tu sikilunung ni Ngangay.
S.PHON: ŋiʦu sakamaja sivuʎuq, sa ʎuʎu-i tu sikiɭunuŋ ni ŋaŋaj.
S.TRANSL: It was just peel she threw over; and Ngangay picked it up and crumbled it up.
Her mother finished eating and got down (from the tree (OA)).

S.FORM: djemaqut anan aken tu ku kinatsu a sema umaq."
S.PHON: ɉəmaqut anan akən tu ku kinaʦu a səma umaq."
S.FORM: djemaqut anan aken tu ku kinacu a sema umaq."
S.PHON: ɉəmaqut anan akən tu ku kinaʦu a səma umaq."
S.TRANSL: I’ll first take the taro home and cut the ends off.”

S.FORM: "pai tutu anga, kina; matsuɫangata ti Tjugeluy."
S.PHON: "pai tutu aŋa, kina; maʦuʎaŋata ti cugəɭuj."
S.FORM: "pai tutu anga, kina; maculjangata ti Tjugeluy."
S.PHON: "pai tutu aŋa, kina; maʦuʎaŋata ti ʦugəɭuj."
S.TRANSL: “Do suckle him, mother; Tjugeluy is really hungry.”

S.FORM: ku palautaw anan tutsu a tsevatseva."
S.PHON: ku paɭautaw anan tuʦu a ʦəvaʦəva."
S.FORM: ku palautaw anan tucu a cevaceva."
S.PHON: ku paɭautaw anan tuʦu a ʦəvaʦəva."
S.TRANSL: I’ll just get them across this ravine.”

S.FORM: "ainu anga i kina?" aya ti Ngangay.
S.PHON: "ainu aŋa i kina" aja ti ŋaŋaj.
S.FORM: "ainu anga i kina?" aya ti Ngangay.
S.PHON: "ainu aŋa i kina" aja ti ŋaŋaj.
S.TRANSL: “Where has mother got to?” said Ngangay.

S.FORM: nu patsun ta qutsivauvaw, "uzay anga ti kina a malap tjanuitjen."
S.PHON: nu paʦun ta quʦivauvaw, "uzaj aŋa ti kina a maɭap canuicən."
S.FORM: nu pacun ta qucivauvaw, "uzay anga ti kina a malap tjanuitjen."
S.PHON: nu paʦun ta quʦivauvaw, "uzaj aŋa ti kina a maɭap ʦanuiʦən."
S.TRANSL: When she saw a fire-fly, she thought: “Now mother has come to collect us.”

S.FORM: nu djemaɫun a qutsivauvaw, "ari kitjaula-u, Tjugeluy.
S.PHON: nu ɉəmaʎun a quʦivauvaw, "ari kicauɭa-u, cugəɭuj.
S.FORM: nu djemaljun a qucivauvaw, "ari kitjaula-u, Tjugeluy.
S.PHON: nu ɉəmaʎun a quʦivauvaw, "ari kiʦauɭa-u, ʦugəɭuj.
S.TRANSL: When the fire-fly came, she said: “Come on, Tjugeluy, let’s stop this.
She tore the coverlet to make tails,
and split (?) the cape to make wings.

S.FORM: "ari, ɫevavavi ta kasiw, sa tja patsuni ti kama."
S.PHON: "ari, ʎəvavavi ta kasiw, sa ca paʦuni ti kama."
S.FORM: "ari, ljevavavi ta kasiw, sa tja pacuni ti kama."
S.PHON: "ari, ʎəvavavi ta kasiw, sa ʦa paʦuni ti kama."
S.TRANSL: “Come on, let’s go up a tree and watch father.”

S.FORM: ɫakua qadjaw tuki anemanema sengsengan i djalan."
S.PHON: ʎakua qaɉaw tuki anəmanəma səŋsəŋan i ɉaɭan."
S.FORM: ljakua qadjaw tuki anemanema sengsengan i djalan."
S.PHON: ʎakua qaɉaw tuki anəmanəma səŋsəŋan i ɉaɭan."
S.TRANSL: But I don’t know what they are doing on the way.”

S.FORM: aku a ika ken a tsatsevutsevung?"
S.PHON: aku a ika kən a ʦaʦəvuʦəvuŋ"
S.FORM: aku a ika ken a cacevucevung?"
S.PHON: aku a ika kən a ʦaʦəvuʦəvuŋ"
S.TRANSL: Why don’t I meet up with them?”
But mother forced us into this

S.FORM: "siseqas ta vaɫvaɫ, sa veseqitji ti Tjukutjuku.
S.PHON: "sisəqas ta vaʎvaʎ, sa vəsəqici ti cukucuku.
S.FORM: "siseqas ta valjvalj, sa veseqitji ti Tjukutjuku.
S.PHON: "sisəqas ta vaʎvaʎ, sa vəsəqiʦi ti ʦukuʦuku.
S.TRANSL: He cut a palm, and beat Tjuktjuku (She became a mouse (OA)).
There’s a hole in your storage box.”
friend, let’s fly away from here.
